faqs.question: What spider species are most common in Freeport?
faqs.answer: Freeport homeowners typically encounter common house spiders, cellar spiders, wolf spiders, and occasionally black widows in outdoor areas. The coastal environment and older home construction in many Freeport neighborhoods can attract various spider species seeking shelter and prey.
